title: Asana Webhook Event
description: An event object representing a change to a resource, delivered asynchronously to the target location of an active webhook subscription.

user.description: The user who triggered the event. May be null for system-generated events.

resource.description: The resource that triggered the event by being modified.

type.description: Deprecated. The type of the resource that generated the event.

action.description: The type of action taken on the resource.

parent.description: For added/removed events, the parent object. Null for other event types.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the event occurred.

change.description: Information about the field-level change. Only present when action is 'changed'.

field.description: The name of the field that has changed.

action.description: The type of action taken on the field.

new_value.description: The new value when change.action is 'changed' and value is an Asana resource.

added_value.description: The added value when change.action is 'added' and value is an Asana resource.

removed_value.description: The removed value when change.action is 'removed' and value is an Asana resource.
